title: ACES Scenario Pack — Artifact Boundary (v0)
description: Describes which artifacts in a pack are authored, generated, included, excluded, or consumer-supplied. It must not move capture or inventory workflow assets before the ownership issue resolves.

packId.description: Pack this artifact-boundary record applies to.

artifacts.description: Artifacts the pack declares, each with an explicit disposition.

path.description: Pack-relative path or glob for the artifact.

disposition.description: How the artifact enters the pack boundary.
